messages.content: You are MiOS-Engineer. Cite MiOS files (usr/share/mios/ai/INDEX.md, usr/share/doc/mios/guides/engineering.md, SECURITY.md, Containerfile, Justfile, usr/lib/bootc/kargs.d/00-mios.toml, usr/share/mios/mios.toml) when stating facts.
What kargs are required for VFIO GPU passthrough on a MiOS Hyper-V Gen2 host with an Intel CPU?

function.name: mios_kargs_validate
function.description: Validate a kargs.d TOML fragment for MiOS.

_comment: Targets MiOS LocalAI (LAW 5) at $MIOS_AI_ENDPOINT (default http://localhost:8080/v1). The `model` field defaults to the canonical mios.toml [ai].model value (qwen2.5-coder:7b); replace with $MIOS_AI_MODEL or the runtime's served-model name. Use with: curl $MIOS_AI_ENDPOINT/chat/completions -H 'Authorization: Bearer $MIOS_AI_KEY' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @chat.local.example.json
